_metadata.title: BNS (Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023) – Complete Bail Classification
_metadata.source: First Schedule, Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023
_metadata.note: Sourced from official NCRB/India Code schedule. 'Cognizable' = police may arrest without warrant. 'Non-cognizable' = police shall NOT arrest without warrant. Bail status is per the First Schedule of BNSS.

antil_categories.A: Offences punishable with imprisonment of less than 7 years
antil_categories.B: Offences punishable with imprisonment of 7 years or more but less than life imprisonment or death
antil_categories.C: Offences punishable with life imprisonment or death

49.offence: Abetment of any offence, if the act abetted is committed in consequence, and where no express provision is made for its punishment
49.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
49.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
49.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

50.offence: Abetment of any offence, if the person abetted does act with different intention from that of abettor
50.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
50.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
50.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

51.offence: Abetment of any offence, when one act is abetted and a different act is done; subject to proviso
51.punishment: Same as for offence intended to be abetted
51.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
51.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
51.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

52.offence: Abettor when liable to cumulative punishment for act abetted and for act done
52.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
52.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
52.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

53.offence: Abetment of any offence, when an effect is caused by the act abetted different from that intended by the abettor
53.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
53.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
53.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

54.offence: Abetment of any offence, if abettor present when offence is committed
54.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
54.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
54.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

55.offence: Abetment of an offence punishable with death or imprisonment for life, if the offence be not committed in consequence of the abetment
55.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
55.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

56.offence: Abetment of an offence punishable with imprisonment, if the offence be not committed in consequence of the abetment
56.punishment: Imprisonment extending to one-fourth of longest term provided for offence, or fine, or both
56.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
56.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
56.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

57.offence: Abetting commission of an offence by the public or by more than ten persons
57.punishment: Imprisonment which may extend to 7 years and fine
57.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
57.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
57.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

58_a.offence: Concealing design to commit offence punishable with death or imprisonment for life, if the offence be committed
58_a.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
58_a.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

58_b.offence: Concealing design to commit offence punishable with death or imprisonment for life, if the offence be not committed
58_b.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
58_b.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

59_a.offence: A public servant concealing a design to commit an offence which it is his duty to prevent, if the offence be committed
59_a.punishment: Imprisonment extending to one-half of longest term provided for offence, or fine, or both
59_a.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
59_a.is_bailable: According as offence abetted is bailable or non-bailable
59_a.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

59_b.offence: Public servant concealing design – if the offence be punishable with death or imprisonment for life
59_b.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
59_b.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

59_c.offence: Public servant concealing design – if the offence be not committed
59_c.punishment: Imprisonment extending to one-fourth of longest term provided for offence, or fine, or both
59_c.cognizable: According as offence abetted is cognizable or non-cognizable
59_c.triable_by: Court by which offence abetted is triable

61_2_a.offence: Criminal conspiracy to commit an offence punishable with death, imprisonment for life or rigorous imprisonment for a term of 2 years or upwards
61_2_a.punishment: Same as for abetment of the offence which is the object of the conspiracy
61_2_a.cognizable: According as the offence which is the object of conspiracy is cognizable or non-cognizable
61_2_a.is_bailable: According as offence which is object of conspiracy is bailable or non-bailable
61_2_a.triable_by: Court by which abetment of the offence which is the object of conspiracy is triable

61_2_b.punishment: Imprisonment for 6 months, or fine, or both

62.offence: Attempting to commit offence punishable with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment, and in such attempt doing any act towards the commission of the offence
62.punishment: One half of the imprisonment for life, or imprisonment not exceeding one-half of the longest term provided for the offence, or fine, or both
62.cognizable: According as the offence is cognizable or non-cognizable
62.is_bailable: According as the offence attempted by the offender is bailable or non-bailable
62.triable_by: The court by which the offence attempted is triable

64_1.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 10 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and fine

64_2.offence: Rape by a police officer or public servant or member of armed forces or person in management/staff of jail/remand home/hospital, or rape committed by person in a position of trust or authority, or by a near relative
64_2.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 10 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) and fine

65_1.offence: Rape on a woman under sixteen years of age
65_1.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 20 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) and fine

65_2.offence: Rape on a woman under twelve years of age
65_2.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 20 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) and fine, or death

66.offence: Rape inflicting injury which causes death or causes the woman to be in a persistent vegetative state
66.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 20 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) or death

67.offence: Sexual intercourse by husband upon his wife during separation
67.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 2 years but which may extend to 7 years and fine

68.offence: Sexual intercourse by a person in authority, etc.
68.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to 10 years and fine

69.offence: Sexual intercourse by employing deceitful means, etc. (false promise of marriage, suppressed identity, etc.)
69.punishment: Imprisonment which may extend to 10 years and fine

70_1.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 20 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) and fine

70_2.offence: Gang rape on a woman under eighteen years of age
70_2.punishment: Imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) and fine, or death

71.punishment: Imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) or death

72_1.offence: Disclosure of identity of the victim of certain offences, etc.

73.offence: Printing or publication of a proceeding without prior permission of court

74.offence: Assault or use of criminal force to woman with intent to outrage her modesty
74.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year which may extend to 5 years and fine

75_2.offence: Sexual harassment (clauses i, ii, iii of sub-section 1)
75_2.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment with 3 years, or fine, or both

75_3.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both

76.offence: Assault or use of criminal force to woman with intent to disrobe
76.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 3 years but which may extend to 7 years and fine

77.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 1 year but which may extend to 3 years and fine (first conviction). Imprisonment 3–7 years on subsequent conviction.

78_2.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and fine (first conviction). Imprisonment up to 5 years and fine (subsequent conviction).

79.offence: Uttering any word or making any gesture intended to insult the modesty of a woman, etc.
79.punishment: Simple imprisonment for 3 years and fine

80_2.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 7 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life

81.offence: A man by deceit causing a woman not lawfully married to him to believe that she is lawfully married to him and to cohabit with him in that belief

82_1.offence: Marrying again during the lifetime of a husband or wife

82_2.offence: Same offence with concealment of the former marriage from the person with whom subsequent marriage is contracted

83.offence: A person with fraudulent intention going through the ceremony of being married, knowing that he is not thereby lawfully married
83.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine

84.offence: Enticing or taking away or detaining with a criminal intent a married woman
84.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

85.offence: Punishment for subjecting a married woman to cruelty (by husband or relative)
85.cognizable: Cognizable (only if information given by aggrieved person or blood/marriage relative to officer-in-charge of police station)

87.offence: Kidnapping, abducting or inducing woman to compel her marriage, etc.

88.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine, or both. If woman be quick with child: Imprisonment for 7 years and fine.

89.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

90_1.offence: Death caused by an act done with intent to cause miscarriage

90_2.offence: Death caused by act done with intent to cause miscarriage without woman's consent
90_2.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or as above

91.offence: Act done with intent to prevent a child being born alive, or to cause it to die after its birth
91.punishment: Imprisonment for 10 years, or fine, or both

92.offence: Causing death of a quick unborn child by an act amounting to culpable homicide

93.offence: Exposure of a child under 12 years of age by parent or person having care of it with intention of wholly abandoning it
93.punishment: Imprisonment for 7 years, or fine, or both

94.offence: Concealment of birth by secret disposal of dead body
94.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

95.offence: Hiring, employing or engaging a child to commit an offence
95.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 3 years but which may extend to 10 years and fine. If offence be committed: Same as for the offence committed.

97.offence: Kidnapping or abducting a child under ten years with intent to steal from its person

98.offence: Selling child for purposes of prostitution, etc.

99.offence: Buying child for purposes of prostitution, etc.
99.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 7 years but which may extend to 14 years and fine

103_1.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life and fine

103_2.offence: Murder by group of five or more persons
103_2.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life and fine

104.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life)

105.offence: Culpable homicide not amounting to murder
105.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to 10 years and fine (if done with intention of causing death). Imprisonment for 10 years and fine (if done with knowledge).

106_1.punishment: Imprisonment for 5 years and fine. For registered medical practitioner: Imprisonment for 2 years and fine.

106_2.offence: Causing death by rash and negligent driving of vehicle and escaping

107.offence: Abetment of suicide of child or person of unsound mind, etc.
107.punishment: Death, or imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

109_1.punishment: Imprisonment for 10 years and fine. If such act causes hurt to any person: Imprisonment for life, or as above.

109_2.offence: Attempt by life-convict to murder, if hurt is caused
109_2.punishment: Death, or imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life)

110.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine, or both. If hurt caused: Imprisonment for 7 years, or fine, or both.

111_2_a.offence: Organised crime resulting in death of any person
111_2_a.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life and fine of not less than Rs. 10 lakh

111_2_b.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine of not less than Rs. 5 lakh

111_3.offence: Abetting, attempting, conspiring or knowingly facilitating the commission of organised crime
111_3.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine of not less than Rs. 5 lakh

111_4.offence: Being a member of an organised crime syndicate
111_4.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine of not less than Rs. 5 lakh

111_5.offence: Intentionally harbouring or concealing any person who committed offence of organised crime
111_5.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 3 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine of not less than Rs. 5 lakh

111_6.offence: Possessing property derived or obtained from the commission of organised crime
111_6.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 3 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine of not less than Rs. 2 lakh

111_7.offence: Possessing property on behalf of a member of an organised crime syndicate
111_7.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 3 years but which may extend to imprisonment for 10 years and fine of not less than Rs. 1 lakh

112.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 1 year but which may extend to 7 years and fine

113_2_a.offence: Terrorist act resulting in the death of any person
113_2_a.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life and fine

113_2_b.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine

113_3.offence: Conspiring, attempting, abetting or knowingly facilitating the commission of terrorist act
113_3.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine

113_4.offence: Organising camps, training, etc., for commission of terrorist act
113_4.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine

113_5.offence: Being a member of an organisation involved in terrorist act

113_6.offence: Harbouring, concealing, etc., of any person who committed a terrorist act
113_6.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 3 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine

113_7.offence: Possessing property derived or obtained from commission of terrorist act

115_2.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year or fine of Rs. 10,000, or both

117_3.offence: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt resulting in permanent disability or persistent vegetative state
117_3.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 10 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life)

117_4.offence: Grievous hurt caused by a group of 5 or more persons

118_1.offence: Voluntarily causing hurt by dangerous weapons or means
118_1.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine of Rs. 20,000, or both

118_2.offence: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt by dangerous weapons or means (except as provided in section 122(2))
118_2.punishment: Imprisonment for life or imprisonment of not less than 1 year but which may extend to 10 years and fine

119_1.offence: Voluntarily causing hurt to extort property, or to constrain to an illegal act

119_2.offence: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt for any purpose referred to in sub-section (1)
119_2.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

120_1.offence: Voluntarily causing hurt to extort confession or information, or to compel restoration of property, etc.

120_2.offence: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt to extort confession or information, or to compel restoration of property, etc.

121_1.offence: Voluntarily causing hurt to deter public servant from his duty
121_1.punishment: Imprisonment for 5 years, or fine, or both

121_2.offence: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt to deter public servant from his duty
121_2.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 1 year, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

122_1.offence: Voluntarily causing hurt on grave and sudden provocation, not intending to hurt any other than the person who gave the provocation
122_1.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 month, or fine of Rs. 5,000, or both

122_2.offence: Causing grievous hurt on grave and sudden provocation, not intending to hurt any other than the person who gave the provocation
122_2.punishment: Imprisonment for 5 years, or fine of Rs. 10,000, or both

123.offence: Causing hurt by means of poison, etc., with intent to commit an offence

124_1.offence: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt by use of acid, etc.
124_1.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 10 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine

124_2.offence: Voluntarily throwing or attempting to throw acid
124_2.punishment: Imprisonment for 5 years but which may extend to 7 years and fine

125.offence: Doing any act endangering human life or personal safety of others
125.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 months, or fine of Rs. 2,500, or both

125_a.offence: Act endangering human life – where hurt is caused
125_a.punishment: Imprisonment for 6 months, or fine of Rs. 5,000, or both

125_b.offence: Act endangering human life – where grievous hurt is caused
125_b.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine of Rs. 10,000, or both

126_2.punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 month, or fine of Rs. 5,000, or both

127_2.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year, or fine of Rs. 5,000, or both

127_3.offence: Wrongfully confining for three or more days
127_3.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine of Rs. 10,000, or both

127_4.offence: Wrongfully confining for 10 or more days
127_4.punishment: Imprisonment for 5 years and fine of Rs. 10,000

127_5.offence: Keeping any person in wrongful confinement, knowing that a writ has been issued for his liberation
127_5.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years in addition to any other section and fine

127_6.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years in addition to other punishment and fine

127_7.offence: Wrongful confinement for the purpose of extorting property, or constraining to an illegal act, etc.

127_8.offence: Wrongful confinement for the purpose of extorting confession or information, or for compelling restoration of property, etc.

131.offence: Assault or criminal force otherwise than on grave provocation
131.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 months, or fine of Rs. 1,000, or both

132.offence: Assault or use of criminal force to deter public servant from discharge of his duty
132.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

133.offence: Assault or criminal force with intent to dishonour a person, otherwise than on grave and sudden provocation
133.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

134.offence: Assault or criminal force in attempt to commit theft of property worn or carried by a person
134.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

135.offence: Assault or use of criminal force in attempt wrongfully to confine a person
135.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year, or fine of Rs. 5,000, or both

136.offence: Assault or use of criminal force on grave and sudden provocation
136.punishment: Simple imprisonment for one month, or fine of Rs. 1,000, or both

139_1.offence: Kidnapping a child for purposes of begging
139_1.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 10 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and fine

139_2.offence: Maiming a child for purposes of begging
139_2.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 20 years which may extend to remainder of that person's natural life, and fine

140_1.offence: Kidnapping or abducting in order to murder
140_1.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or rigorous imprisonment for 10 years and fine

140_2.punishment: Death, or imprisonment for life and fine

140_3.offence: Kidnapping or abducting with intent secretly and wrongfully to confine a person

140_4.offence: Kidnapping or abducting in order to subject a person to grievous hurt, slavery, etc.

141.offence: Importation of a girl or boy from foreign country

142.offence: Wrongfully concealing or keeping in confinement, kidnapped or abducted person
142.triable_by: Court by which the kidnapping or abduction is triable

143_2.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 7 years but which may extend to 10 years and fine

143_3.offence: Trafficking of more than one person
143_3.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 10 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine

143_4.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 10 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine

143_5.offence: Trafficking of more than one child
143_5.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 14 years but which may extend to imprisonment for life and fine

143_6.offence: Person convicted of offence of trafficking of child on more than one occasion
143_6.punishment: Imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) and fine

143_7.offence: Public servant or a police officer involved in trafficking of child
143_7.punishment: Imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life) and fine

144_1.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 5 years but which may extend to 10 years and fine

144_2.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 3 years but which may extend to 7 years and fine

145.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

146.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both

147.offence: Waging or attempting to wage war, or abetting the waging of war, against the Government of India
147.punishment: Death, or imprisonment for life and fine

148.offence: Conspiring to commit certain offences against the State
148.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

149.offence: Collecting arms, etc., with the intention of waging war against the Government of India
149.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

150.offence: Concealing with intent to facilitate a design to wage war

151.offence: Assaulting President, Governor, etc., with intent to compel or restrain the exercise of any lawful power

152.offence: Act endangering sovereignty, unity and integrity of India
152.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 7 years and fine

153.offence: Waging war against Government of any foreign State at peace with the Government of India
153.punishment: Imprisonment for life and fine, or imprisonment for 7 years and fine, or fine

154.offence: Committing depredation on the territories of any foreign state at peace with the Government of India
154.punishment: Imprisonment for 7 years and fine, and forfeiture of certain property

155.offence: Receiving property taken by war or depredation mentioned in sections 153 and 154
155.punishment: Imprisonment for 7 years and fine, and forfeiture of certain property

156.offence: Public servant voluntarily allowing prisoner of state or war in his custody to escape
156.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

157.offence: Public servant negligently suffering prisoner of State or war in his custody to escape
157.punishment: Simple imprisonment for 3 years and fine

158.offence: Aiding escape of, rescuing or harbouring such prisoner
158.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

159.offence: Abetting mutiny, or attempting to seduce an officer, soldier, sailor or airman from his allegiance or duty
159.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

160.offence: Abetment of mutiny, if mutiny is committed in consequence thereof
160.punishment: Death, or imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

161.offence: Abetment of assault by an officer, soldier, sailor or airman on his superior officer, when in execution of his office

162.offence: Abetment of such assault, if the assault committed

163.offence: Abetment of the desertion of an officer, soldier, sailor or airman
163.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

164.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

165.offence: Deserter concealed on board merchant vessel through negligence of master

166.offence: Abetment of act of insubordination by an officer, soldier, sailor or airman if the offence be committed in consequence
166.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

168.offence: Wearing garb or carrying token used by soldier, sailor or airman
168.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 months, or fine of Rs. 2,000, or both

173.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year or fine, or both, or if treating only, fine only

174.offence: Undue influence or personation at an election
174.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both

175.offence: False statement in connection with an election

176.offence: Illegal payments in connection with elections

178.offence: Counterfeiting coins, government stamps, currency-notes or bank-notes
178.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

179.offence: Using as genuine forged or counterfeit coin, Government stamp, currency-notes or bank-notes
179.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

180.offence: Possession of forged or counterfeit coin, Government stamp, currency-notes or bank-notes
180.punishment: Imprisonment for 7 years, or fine, or both

181.offence: Making, buying, selling or possessing machinery, instrument or material for forging or counterfeiting coins, Government stamp, currency-notes or bank-notes
181.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for 10 years and fine

182_1.offence: Making or using documents resembling currency-notes or bank-notes

183.offence: Effacing any writing from a substance bearing a Government stamp, removing stamp used for it, with intent to cause loss to Government
183.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine, or both

184.offence: Using a Government stamp known to have been before used
184.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

185.offence: Erasure of mark denoting that stamps have been used
185.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine, or both

187.offence: Person employed in a Mint causing coin to be of a different weight or composition from that fixed by law

188.offence: Unlawfully taking from a Mint any coining instrument

189_2.offence: Being member of an unlawful assembly
189_2.punishment: Imprisonment for 6 months, or fine, or both

189_3.offence: Joining or continuing in an unlawful assembly, knowing that it has been commanded to disperse
189_3.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

189_4.offence: Joining an unlawful assembly armed with any deadly weapon
189_4.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

191_2.punishment: Imprisonment for 2 years, or fine, or both

191_3.offence: Rioting, armed with a deadly weapon
191_3.punishment: Imprisonment for 5 years, or fine, or both

196_1.offence: Promoting enmity between different groups on ground of religion, race, place of birth, residence, language, etc.
196_1.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine, or both

196_2.offence: Promoting enmity between classes in place of worship, etc.

197_1.offence: Imputations, assertions prejudicial to national integration
197_1.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine, or both

198.offence: Public servant disobeying direction of the law with intent to cause injury to any person
198.punishment: Simple imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both

199.offence: Public servant disobeying direction under law
199.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than 6 months which may extend to 2 years and fine

200.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both

204.punishment: Imprisonment for not less than 6 months but which may extend to 3 years and fine

205.offence: Wearing garb or carrying token used by public servant with fraudulent intent
205.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 months, or fine of Rs. 5,000, or both

209.offence: Non-appearance in response to a proclamation under section 84 of this Sanhita
209.punishment: Imprisonment for 3 years, or fine, or both, or community service. If declared proclaimed offender: Imprisonment for 7 years and fine.

226.offence: Attempt to commit suicide to compel or restrain exercise of lawful power
226.punishment: Imprisonment for 1 year, or fine, or both, or community service
